name: mc-test-monorepo
description: mc-test — WebDriver/Appium-style automated testing framework for Minecraft plugins & mods (monorepo root)

scripts.build: npm run build -w @mc-test/protocol && npm run build -w @mc-test/driver-headless && npm run build -w @mc-test/driver-inprocess && npm run build -w @mc-test/driver-pixel && npm run build -w @mc-test/runner
